MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Patricia Henle, Esq, appeared for the plaintiff and the defendant appeared in pro per. The matter settled and terms and conditions placed on record. Trial date is vacated.
